model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"summaries","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 5e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"OPTIMIZER = \"adamw\"","old":"OPTIMIZER = \"adam\"","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = True","old":"USE_LR_SCHEDULE = False","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"summaries","rationale":"Enable a scheduler-driven optimization profile under the fixed 256-step budget while pairing it with AdamW and a moderately higher LR for faster early progress and better final loss.","secondary_modes":["indexing","topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BASE_CHANNELS = 8","new":"BASE_CHANNELS = 16","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase representational capacity of the micro-resnet while keeping the training loop unchanged, targeting better fit within the fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"        self.blocks = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(channels, channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(channels) if USE_BATCHNORM else nn.Identity(),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            ResidualBlock(channels, dropout=DROPOUT_RATE, use_bn=USE_BATCHNORM),
        )","new":"        self.blocks = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(channels, channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(channels) if USE_BATCHNORM else nn.Identity(),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            ResidualBlock(channels, dropout=DROPOUT_RATE, use_bn=USE_BATCHNORM),
            ResidualBlock(channels, dropout=DROPOUT_RATE, use_bn=USE_BATCHNORM),
        )","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Add one more residual block at constant width to increase depth and feature refinement capacity without changing optimizer or training loop behavior.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Slightly reduce step size for the now-deeper model to improve optimization stability and final validation loss under the same fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["layout","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"With only 256 training steps, reducing weight decay can improve short-horizon fitting for this compact model and potentially lower validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk","layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Restore a faster learning-rate scale that previously worked better with this architecture depth under the fixed-step cosine schedule.","secondary_modes":["layout","caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 32","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 64","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"Increase classifier head capacity to better leverage learned convolutional features and improve separability with minimal architectural disruption.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Increase examples processed per optimization step under fixed-step evaluation to improve sample efficiency and potentially reduce validation loss.","secondary_modes":["topk","layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Match the larger batch regime with a higher learning-rate scale to improve progress per step within the fixed 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["micro","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Test a higher step size to capitalize on the larger batch setting and potentially reach a better loss basin within the same 256-step budget.","secondary_modes":["micro","summaries"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Use a lower second-moment beta to make AdamW adapt faster in a short 256-step training horizon.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"indexing","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"indexing","rationale":"Revert to the more stable AdamW second-moment setting that performed better in this training regime.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 192","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Probe a larger effective batch for better sample efficiency per step while avoiding the full runtime jump of batch 256.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Scale learning rate up with the larger batch to improve optimization progress per step within the fixed-step budget.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 192","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 256","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"micro","rationale":"Further increase the number of samples processed per optimization step to maximize fixed-step data throughput.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Test a slightly larger learning-rate scale to further exploit the high-batch fixed-step regime.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3.5e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Continue LR scaling in the high-batch regime to test whether a slightly more aggressive update improves final loss within 256 steps.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 3.5e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 3e-3","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"Step back to the better-performing learning rate after the slight regression at 3.5e-3.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 0.0","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Add a very light regularization term to improve generalization without materially slowing short-horizon optimization.","secondary_modes":["topk","micro"]}
